package rulecoverage

import (
    "bufio"
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "os"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for bytes_newreader_on_string_conversion: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `bytes.NewReader([]byte(s))` instead of `strings.NewReader(s)`.
type CaseBytesNewreaderOnStringConversionDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBytesNewreaderOnStringConversionModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBytesNewreaderOnStringConversionRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBytesNewreaderOnStringConversionModel
}

type CaseBytesNewreaderOnStringConversionService struct {
    repo *CaseBytesNewreaderOnStringConversionRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBytesNewreaderOnStringConversionAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeBytesNewreaderOnStringConversion(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBytesNewreaderOnStringConversionDTO) error {
    focus := "bytes_newreader_on_string_conversion"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    file, _ := os.Open(input)
    reader := bufio.NewReader(file)
    _ = reader
    bytes_newreader_string_conversion_negative := map[string]int{"bytes": 1, "newreader": 2, "string": 3, "conversion": 4}
    bytes_newreader_string_conversion_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    bytes_negative_0 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = bytes_negative_0
    newreader_negative_1 := bytes_newreader_string_conversion_negative["newreader"] + len(input)
    _ = newreader_negative_1
    string_negative_2 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = string_negative_2
    conversion_negative_3 := bytes_newreader_string_conversion_negative["conversion"] + len(input)
    _ = conversion_negative_3
    return nil
}
